text: The best way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
author: Walt Disney

text: Don’t let yesterday take up too much of today.
author: Will Rogers

text: It’s not whether you get knocked down, it’s whether you get up.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: If you are working on something exciting, it will keep you motivated.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Success is not in what you have, but who you are.
author: Bo Bennett

text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
author: Unknown

text: Dream bigger. Do bigger.
author: Unknown

text: Don’t stop when you’re tired. Stop when you’re done.
author: Marilyn Monroe

text: Wake up with determination. Go to bed with satisfaction.
author: George Lorimer

text: Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
author: Sean Patrick Flanery

text: Little things make big days.
author: Isabel Marant

text: It always seems impossible until it’s done.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
author: Unknown

text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
author: Unknown

text: Stay positive. Work hard. Make it happen.
author: Unknown

text: Don’t wait for opportunity. Create it.
author: Unknown

text: Sometimes we’re tested not to show our weaknesses, but to discover our strengths.
author: Unknown

text: The key to success is to focus on goals, not obstacles.
author: Unknown

text: Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will.
author: Suzy Kassem

text: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
author: C.S. Lewis

text: Don’t limit your challenges. Challenge your limits.
author: Unknown

text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
author: Unknown

text: Sometimes later becomes never. Do it now.
author: Unknown

text: Success doesn’t just find you. You have to go out and get it.
author: Unknown

text: The dream is free. The hustle is sold separately.
author: Unknown

text: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
author: Abraham Lincoln (attributed)

text: You are stronger than you think.
author: Unknown

text: Don’t be afraid to start over. It’s a chance to build something better.
author: Unknown

text: Work hard in silence. Let success make the noise.
author: Frank Ocean (attributed)

text: Your only limit is your mind.
author: Unknown

text: Small steps every day.
author: Unknown

text: Consistency beats talent when talent doesn’t work hard.
author: Unknown

text: Do it with passion or not at all.
author: Rosa Nouchette Carey (attributed)

text: The pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow.
author: Unknown

text: Focus on progress, not perfection.
author: Unknown

text: Don’t fear failure. Fear being in the same place next year.
author: Unknown

text: Great things take time.
author: Unknown

text: Be so good they can’t ignore you.
author: Steve Martin

text: You don’t have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: Success is what happens after you survive all your mistakes.
author: Unknown

text: If it doesn’t challenge you, it won’t change you.
author: Fred DeVito

text: The future depends on what you do today.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: Keep going. Everything you need will come to you at the perfect time.
author: Unknown

text: Strive for progress, not perfection.
author: Unknown

text: Your life does not get better by chance, it gets better by change.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Difficult roads often lead to beautiful destinations.
author: Unknown

text: Don’t wait. The time will never be just right.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
author: William James

text: Believe you can and you’re halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
author: Wayne Gretzky

text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
author: Arthur Ashe

text: Everything you can imagine is real.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Don’t wish it were easier. Wish you were better.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Do what you feel in your heart to be right.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: Opportunities don’t happen. You create them.
author: Chris Grosser

text: Hustle in silence and let your success make the noise.
author: Unknown

text: Stay hungry. Stay foolish.
author: Steve Jobs

text: You are what you repeatedly do.
author: Aristotle

text: The only limit is the one you set yourself.
author: Unknown

text: Be fearless in the pursuit of what sets your soul on fire.
author: Unknown

text: A year from now you may wish you had started today.
author: Karen Lamb

text: Make it happen. Shock everyone.
author: Unknown

text: Don’t downgrade your dream just to fit your reality.
author: Unknown

text: You don’t find willpower, you create it.
author: Unknown

text: Excuses will always be there for you. Opportunity won’t.
author: Unknown

text: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
author: Oprah Winfrey

text: Everything is hard before it is easy.
author: Goethe

text: Work until your idols become your rivals.
author: Unknown

text: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

text: Keep your eyes on the stars, and your feet on the ground.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: What you do today can improve all your tomorrows.
author: Ralph Marston

text: If you want something you’ve never had, you must do something you’ve never done.
author: Thomas Jefferson

text: Don’t wait for the perfect moment. Take the moment and make it perfect.
author: Unknown

text: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn’t work hard.
author: Tim Notke

text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
author: Christian D. Larson

text: The best revenge is massive success.
author: Frank Sinatra

text: You become what you believe.
author: Oprah Winfrey

text: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
author: Robert Collier

text: Don’t stop until you’re proud.
author: Unknown
